user.title: HA Sentinel
user.description: Monitor the health of your Home Assistant integrations and get notified when something breaks.

data.fire_events: Fire bus events on state changes

data_description.grace_period: How long an integration must remain in a failed state before being reported (0 = immediate).
data_description.fire_events: Fire a `ha_sentinel_item_changed` event on the HA event bus whenever an item changes state. Useful for automations.

data_description.fire_events: Fire a `ha_sentinel_item_changed` event on the HA event bus whenever an item changes state.
data_description.excluded_entries: Select integrations to exclude from monitoring.
